/DAWT/COLT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE (HD ADU) TO BE DETERMINED) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO; SUBMIT TO UA'S; NOTTO CONSUME ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA; ATTEND COUNSELING & GROUPS/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: MISDEMEANOR BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/

/CAL: MISDEMEANOR BEHAVIOR COURT/CTORD: THIS CASE BE ADDED ON CALENDAR/X:JUDGE CROMPTON IN COURTROOM/X:DA AND PD VIA ZOOM/DEF: VIA ZOOM/DEF: ACCEPTED INTO MISDEMEANOR BHC/DEF: TO REMAIN IN HOME DETENTION AND ELECTRONICMONITORING/DEF: REQUIRED TO SUBMIT TO TESTING/VD: 10-15-21 COURT DATE/CONTD MISD BEHAVIOR COURT, DOP /CONTD: MISDEMEANOR BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ACM/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOMEDETENTION AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/WEAP/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO SURRENDER ANY WEAPONS, PEPPER SPRAY, OR INCENDIARY DEVICES IN HER POSSESSION/SA4: CVS PHARMACY AT 581 MARKET ST, SF/SAORD/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO JOIN 21008970 AND 21000721 FOR MBHC/DOP/
